pr.title: Record: 11L Full GPTQ + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff (fixed-alpha 0.9757 / entropy-adaptive 0.9605, 3-seed)

output.summary: 11L GPTQ int6 model blends fixed or entropy-weighted multi-order backward-looking n-gram cache after full Hessian calibration within the training budget.
techniques: 11L GQA/LeakyReLU GPTQ int6 with reserved-budget full Hessian calibration
Multi-order backward-looking n-gram cache interpolated with a fixed or entropy-derived alpha
Entropy-derived alpha depends solely on model output distribution
